overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a brown coat and hat walking through a rainy, gaslit historic city at night. A tram passes by on the wet cobblestone street as lightning flashes in the stormy sky, with the character eventually moving to the sidewalk along ornate brick buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet cobblestone street with historic storefronts and tram tracks

events.description: tram approaches from ahead and passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the wet cobblestone street toward the approaching tram

notable_agents.action: tram moving along tracks, passing the character on the right

entered.detail: ornate multi-story brick buildings with wrought iron balconies and lit windows
red fabric awning over a shop entrance with signage
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street
tall cast iron street lamps emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wet cobblestone street lined with historic brick buildings on the left. A tram approaches from ahead and passes by on the right, its interior lights visible. Gas street lamps cast a warm glow through the rainy night atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cobblestone intersection with scattered trees

events.description: lightning flashes across the dark sky illuminating the street and buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward an open intersection with trees visible ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated building with classical architecture visible at the end of the street
line of mature trees along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The street opens up into a wider intersection with trees lining the right side. A large mansion is visible in the distance. Lightning suddenly flashes across the sky, briefly illuminating the wet cobblestones and the ornate buildings now receding behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large intersection with tram shelter and construction scaffolding

events.description: second tram approaches from the right and passes across the intersection ahead
lightning strikes in the sky above the street lamps

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection as a second tram passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: tram moving from right to left across the intersection ahead of the character

entered.detail: covered wooden waiting area for tram passengers on the right side
wooden scaffolding covering the facade of a building ahead

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, a second tram passes from right to left. Lightning flashes overhead as the character nears a building covered in construction scaffolding. The historic buildings draw close again on the left while a tram shelter appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along historic building with outdoor furniture and overhang

events.description: character moves from the cobblestone street onto the sidewalk under a building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk close to the building wall, passing outdoor furniture and decorative items

entered.detail: wooden chairs and a barrel placed on the sidewalk outside the building
metal awning extending over the sidewalk providing shelter
antique wooden furniture piece with ornate details against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the sidewalk under a building overhang, walking past wooden chairs and antique furniture placed outside. The space becomes more enclosed as the building facade dominates the left side, while the street opens up to the right. The gas lamps now appear further ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, gaslit city street that transitions from an open thoroughfare into a more enclosed urban sidewalk. It begins with the character walking down wet cobblestones as a tram passes by under the warm glow of gas lamps and historic brick buildings. As the street opens into a wider intersection with distant mansions and lining trees, a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the storm-swept environment. The scene then shifts toward a major intersection where a second tram crosses the path and lightning flashes again near a building shrouded in construction scaffolding. Finally, the camera moves onto the sidewalk under a building overhang, passing antique furniture as the ornate facade closes in on the left and the distant gas lamps fade into the rainy night.
